title: prunus serrulata var. sontagiae
intro: Prunus serrulata var. sontagiae, also known as Japanese flowering cherry or Sontag's cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin and other flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, similar to those found in willow bark. The health benefits of Prunus serrulata var. sontagiae include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and joint pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. Prunus serrulata var. sontagiae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
